description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern kitchen layout with a combination of dark wood and light tan countertops. The set includes a tall, stainless steel refrigerator, a built-in oven and stove, a microwave, and a sink integrated into the counter. The cabinetry consists of both wall-mounted and floor-standing units, with multiple drawers, cupboards, and open shelving for storage. The central island has a unique curved extension, providing additional workspace and seating area. Visible hardware includes sleek bar pulls on doors and drawers, and the overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for an urban kitchen or communal space.
description: A modern kitchen cabinetry set with dark wood cabinets, tan countertops, integrated appliances, and a curved island extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full kitchen layout, including the refrigerator, stove, microwave, sink, and the curved island with visible cabinetry and hardware.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry, the curved island extension, and the alignment of the wall-mounted and floor-standing units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the cabinets, the refrigerator, and the arrangement of the upper and lower cabinetry.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the separation between the island and the main cabinetry, as well as the overall spatial layout.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet, wall cabinet, tall pantry cabinet, drawer unit
attribute_door_configuration: double door, single door, drawers, open shelf
